working_on: Routine task P5-11: Cross-bridges (cross-domain edges pass) — fifteenth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; first session against the cross-bridges tier (eligible for the first time at S-0074 close — all fourteen subject + service deps complete: P5-01a/b, P5-02a/b, P5-03, P5-04a/b, P5-05, P5-06, P5-07a/b, P5-08, P5-09, P5-10). P5-11 is a single-task per phase_5.md T1-B/T1-D; range per phase_5.md T2-A is 0060-0069. Author 0060_seed_crossbridges_part1.sql in the 0060-0069 sub-range; revise PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md to remove cross_domain_dependency reserved entry per the T1-E/T3-B decision (continue disjoint-domain convention; do NOT promote the predicate); append per-session narrative to ROUTING.md. Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper (seventh load-bearing routine-mode exercise per ADR 0055; first six were S-0066, S-0068, S-0070, S-0071, S-0073, S-0074); verify with engine/tools/check_target.py --task-id P5-11 (criteria: migration_applied 0060_seed_crossbridges_part1 + validate_passes) and engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0060_seed_crossbridges_part1.sql with ~65-75 cross-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges between nodes already seeded across the 14 prior subdomain seeds (380 nodes total). Zero new nodes (cross-bridges seed edges only; all endpoints reference pre-existing seeded ids). Three logical groupings: (A) ~40 service-node → philosophy-subdomain bridges (bayes_theorem/probability_mathematical/conditional_probability → bayesian_epistemology + bayesianism_confirmation; expected_value → utilitarianism + dutch_book_argument + social_contract_theory; quantifier → predicate_logic; set_mathematical → russell_paradox + kripke_semantics + possible_worlds; modus_ponens / modus_tollens / inference_rule / formal_proof / validity_logical / soundness_logical → propositional_logic + classical_logic + predicate_logic; bivalence_principle → classical_logic + dialetheism + fuzzy_logic + paraconsistent_logic; truth_value → truth_conditional_semantics; counterexample → gettier_problem; argument_logical → epistemic_justification; modus_tollens → falsificationism; aristotelian_four_causes → causation + scientific_explanation + essence_metaphysical; greek_atomism → physicalism + reductionism_in_science + mereological_nihilism; scholasticism → realism_about_universals + divine_command_theory; renaissance_mechanism → substance_dualism + scientific_theory + scientific_method; vienna_circle_logical_positivism → verificationism + falsificationism + demarcation_problem + tarskis_t_schema + deductive_nomological_model + behaviorism_logical); (B) ~30 within-philosophy cross-subdomain bridges (epistemology↔mind, epistemology↔language, epistemology↔science, epistemology↔logic, metaphysics↔mind, metaphysics↔logic, metaphysics↔ethics, mind↔language, mind↔science, logic↔language, logic↔science, ethics↔mind, ethics↔political); (C) aesthetics deferred to part2 if telemetry warrants (its concepts are more self-contained at the granularity principle — folding into part1 would dilute coherence; sub-range slots 0061-0069 reserved). All edges pedagogical_prerequisite (per the T1-E/T3-B decision to NOT promote cross_domain_dependency — every edge is shape-identical to within-domain prerequisites and the only distinguishing feature is disjoint domain[] arrays, a shape the validator's suspicious_cross_domain_ratio already detects; promoting the predicate would require downstream consumer changes traversal/syllabus/mastery is not authorized to make). Confidence_level not applicable (edges only). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md edit narrowly removes the cross_domain_dependency reserved row + adds a brief note in the section preface recording the S-0075 decision per the manifest's own discipline ('If a reserved entry never gets used by the time the next periodic project health check fires, it should be removed from this list'). Pre-apply node-existence sweep against the seeded 380 ids confirms zero dangling-endpoint risks. Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055. Two-commit pattern. End state: P5-11 complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-11 passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes); P5-12 closeout (depends_on [P5-11]) eligible for next routine fire. graph_version 15→16. Sub-range slots 0061-0069 left reserved. phase: P_5

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was 65-75 cross-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges across the 380-node Phase 5 graph (zero new nodes); delivered exactly 71 edges, in the upper-half of the planned range, no in-session deltas. Three groupings as planned: (A) 45 service-node → philosophy-subdomain bridges (15 service formal-logic; 12 service math; 18 service history terminators), (B) 26 within-philosophy cross-subdomain bridges (epistemology↔mind/language/science/logic; metaphysics↔mind/logic; mind↔language/science; logic↔science; ethics↔mind/political), (C) aesthetics deferred to part2 (sub-range slots 0061-0069 reserved). Five planned edges from the rough declared-scope sketch dropped during edge-list finalization on transitivity-subsumption grounds (e.g., truth_value→truth_conditional_semantics subsumed by truth→truth_conditional_semantics; tarskis_t_schema→truth_conditional_semantics within-domain not cross-domain; personal_identity→psychological_continuity_theory within-domain since both in mind core; metaphysics↔ethics edge causation→consequentialism dropped as tenuous; logic↔epistemology paradox_of_the_ravens→bayesianism_confirmation already covered transitively); not a descope. T1-E/T3-B predicate decision adjudicated as planned: do NOT promote cross_domain_dependency (continue disjoint-domain convention). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md edited as planned to remove the reserved-but-unused row + add S-0075 decision note in section preface. ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended. Pre-apply Python integrity check (regex-extracted 0 nodes + 71 edges, all 142 endpoints in seeded 380-id node set, no duplicates, no self-loops, no cycles in combined 536-edge graph) all clear. Migration applied to paideia-dev via the apply_migration.py wrapper on the first attempt; recorded in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations as version 20260505232807. graph_version 15→16 honored. check_target.py --task-id P5-11 passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes). validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 374 soft-warns (366 missing_rigor_score continuing the partial-seed pattern; 7 issue_collision unchanged; 1 health_check_overdue — audit deferred to S-0076 closeout session). Notably suspicious_cross_domain_ratio did NOT fire — 71 new cross-domain edges represent ~13% of total 536-edge graph, well under the 40% v1 threshold and the philosophy-subdomain-reinterpretation 60% threshold. Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim a4c8eaa + deliverable 9ff5ac5 + this close). Sub-range slots 0061-0069 left reserved. **Seventh load-bearing routine-mode exercise of apply_migration.py wrapper succeeded cleanly on the first apply attempt**: continues to confirm the subprocess-bypass pattern from ADR 0055 works repeatably in routine context across seven independent fires (now durably confirmed across both the nodes+edges shape of the prior six subdomain seeds and the edges-only shape of this cross-bridges seed). **Third consecutive observable confirmation of the S-0072 routine close-out apparatus** (parent FF post-push and post-close worktree sweep): no boot freshness intervention required at session start (worktree was at origin/main HEAD post-S-0074), and the parent-FF chain through the three lifecycle pushes worked cleanly.

outcome_summary: Phase 5 cross-bridges seed lands. P5-11 complete; the cross-bridges tier is fully seeded with 71 cross-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges across the 380-node Phase 5 graph (45 service-node → philosophy-subdomain bridges; 26 within-philosophy cross-subdomain bridges; aesthetics deferred to part2 if telemetry warrants). Zero new nodes. T1-E/T3-B predicate decision: do NOT promote cross_domain_dependency (continue disjoint-domain convention; PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md reserved-but-unused row removed). graph_version 15→16. Seventh load-bearing routine-mode exercise of apply_migration.py wrapper — first-apply success on the edges-only shape (qualitatively distinct from the prior six nodes+edges seeds; wrapper handles transparently). Pre-apply audit clean (0 dangling endpoints, 0 UNIQUE collisions, 0 self-loops, 0 cycles in combined 536-edge graph). validate.py 0 hard-fails 374 soft-warns; suspicious_cross_domain_ratio did NOT fire (71 new edges = ~13% of total). Cadence-overdue surfaces at S-0076 boot (+1); audit deferred to S-0076 closeout session as natural consolidation surface. Phase 5 progress: 15/16 tasks complete; 15 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions — 1 sub-task remaining (P5-12 closeout) — 3-session buffer.
